title: vittadinia cuneata var. murrayensis
intro: Vittadinia cuneata var. murrayensis, also known as Murray's buttonweed, is a plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Vittadinia cuneata var. murrayensis are thought to include wound healing, reduction of inflammation, and antimicrobial activity. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
